- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up view shows a pair of black shoes and a foot resting on a light-colored floor or step while a cardboard or paperboard surface with a star-shaped design is visible in the background.

Main Subject:
Two black lace-up shoes with rounded toe caps are visible from a low, near-the-ground angle; the left shoe shows more of the laces and the inner side, while the right shoe is partially obscured by the foreground. A white sock or cloth is visible at the top of each shoe.

Setting:
Indoors, on a light-colored surface with a border or edge running horizontally across the image. In the background, there is a brown or wooden-looking area and a flat surface with a large white starburst or star-like design. The lighting is warm and slightly dim, with soft focus and blur toward the back.

Visual Details:
The shoes are black with textured uppers and dark laces. The sock fabric appears white and slightly wrinkled. In the foreground, a blurry beige or tan object shaped like a small hand-held item is present on the right side of the image, but its details are unclear. The floor has small dark specks or marks. The background star-like design consists of multiple thin white lines radiating from a central point, and it is blurred.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows black shoes and white socks on a light floor or step. A blurred beige object appears in the foreground while a white starburst design is visible on a surface in the background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
